title: Wild Animal Rescue
subTitle: A medical emergency arises when six tigers are flown from the Netherlands to South Africa; treating lions with medical problems proves to be a challenge.

title: Wild Animal Rescue
subTitle: A dangerous mission into the Gaza Strip has Four Paws dealing with tricky negotiations and red tape in an attempt to rescue two lion cubs from their owner.

title: Wild Animal Rescue
subTitle: Four Paws rescues 15 Kosovo bears from their small cages in private zoos and restaurants; a team goes to Romania's Danube Delta to rescue Europe's last wild horses from the slaughterhouse.

title: Wild Animal Rescue
subTitle: Four Paws gives a new home to a family of five lions who have suffered a harsh life in a Romanian zoo; the team talks about a legal industry that threatens South Africa's lions.

title: Animal Science
subTitle: The beluga whale; the owl.

title: Animal Science
subTitle: The anteater; the walrus.

title: Wild Ones
subTitle: A look at the mighty grizzly bear, the tiny but powerful ant, the intimidating crocodile: some of the world's strongest animals.

title: Wild Ones
subTitle: Investigating which animal is the fastest, featuring animals that move at extreme speeds, including a kangaroo, a zebra, a cheetah and a bald eagle.

title: Wild Ones
subTitle: An exciting look at nature, with close-ups of wild cats, snakes, crocodiles, scorpions and more, focusing on their methods of attack and defense.

title: Animals at Work
subTitle: A crime-busting team of two young Labradors sharpen their sniffing skills for a new challenge, a Newfoundland dog and lifeguard instructor needs more practice in the water and a pig paints to feed his family.

title: Animals at Work
subTitle: A superstar parrot loaded with talent and her own entourage gets ready for an important competition, a bat sniffing Labrador locates a secret lair and a goat reluctantly parts with his fleece to solve a stinky situation.

title: Animals at Work
subTitle: A donkey leaves his life of leisure behind to start a new job.

title: Animals at Work
subTitle: A Sussex Spaniel competes in the first British Truffle Hunting Championship, an extreme doggie athlete attempts his newest challenge and an intelligent goldfish performs his nine tricks.

title: Second Chance Pets
subTitle: A dog named Leo needs a front leg brace to be able to walk; a champion show dog named Sergio needs a knee brace.

title: Second Chance Pets
subTitle: Two dogs from the same home need leg braces; a dog named Scout is missing a leg and needs a brace to combat arthritis.

title: Second Chance Pets
subTitle: A dog needs a front leg prosthetic; a miniature Doberman Pincher needs a brace to help fend off old age.

title: Second Chance Pets
subTitle: A dog named Luna Bell needs two braces to keep walking; a dog named Roland needs his brace tweaked so he can continue going on walks.

title: Adaptable Animals
subTitle: Things are getting tiny as Janice attempts to create a prosthetic leg for a Chihuahua; a talkative black Lab who loves to chase squirrels and an Akita with an autoimmune disease need specialized braces.

title: Adaptable Animals
subTitle: Adaptable Animals

title: Adaptable Animals
subTitle: A black Lab, a boxer-mastiff mix and a Brittany springer are all involved in car accidents.

title: Adaptable Animals
subTitle: Janice has her hands full with a rambunctious young husky who just can't keep still; a special goat who wears four braces brings along his own fan club.

title: Rhino Orphanage
subTitle: It's a bittersweet farewell as the team releases the rehabilitated baby rhinos into the wild.

title: The Last Mahout
subTitle: A Thai man attempts to build a sustainable future of man and elephant.

title: Ocean Vet
subTitle: Neil and the team try to wrestle a big blue marlin to the side of a boat to attach a satellite tracking tag.

title: Ocean Vet
subTitle: Neil tries to save Bermuda's green sea turtles and conduct research on their health and numbers.

title: Ocean Vet
subTitle: Neil and the team are on a rescue mission to save a sixgill shark tangled in deep-sea fishing lines.

title: Ocean Vet
subTitle: In an effort to protect the breeding grounds of the Bermuda black grouper, Neil surgically implants acoustic tags.

title: Frontier Vets
subTitle: Dr. Greg forces the students to attend a local Heritage Festival, something none of them are in the mood for on their 'day off'; they witness the South African dance and folk customs.

title: Frontier Vets
subTitle: Tina's goat case is an emotional rollercoaster for the young vet as the little kid has taken a turn for the worse again; for Tina euthanasia is the humane thing to do, but the owner is extremely religious and refuses to have it killed.

title: Killer Instincts
subTitle: Takes a look at the domains and realms of dangerous animals like the king cobra, jaguar and African hippopotamus.

title: Killer Instincts
subTitle: Examines the lives of the American alligator, python and moray eel, three of the animal kingdom's best lurkers.

title: Killer Instincts
subTitle: The filmmakers explore the lives of three dangerous big cats, the cheetah, the snow leopard and the regal tiger, and how they hunt down their prey.

title: Inside Animal A&E
subTitle: The team springs into action for a puppy hit by a car, Westie's unusual surgery and a Staffordshire that fears fireworks.

title: Inside Animal A&E
subTitle: The team treats Labrador Scuby's lumps, nervous cat Wotzit's jabs, rescue collie Bob and tiny rat Squeaky's stomach growth in a day of unusual cases.

title: Inside Animal A&E
subTitle: Team faces a day of critical animal care from plus-size cat Bob to Angus's gum surgery, a Husky's sore paw and Bandit's urgent bladder operation.

title: Super Senses
subTitle: The sea hosts an enormous quantity of species of fish, mammals, and crustaceans that have unique mechanisms to withstand pressure, low temperatures, and total darkness of the seabed.

title: Super Senses
subTitle: Some animals have crazy looking sense organs, but every feature has a special purpose that has evolved to ensure the survival of the animal.

title: Super Senses
subTitle: Some animals have adapted perfectly to the darkness and can avoid dangers; owls can hear soft sounds from far away; bats orient themselves using echolocation.

subTitle: Queen Rani comes face to face with Zamir; it's a good life for the spinter troop.

subTitle: It's a bittersweet farewell as the team releases the rehabilitated baby rhinos into the wild.

title: The Blue Realm
subTitle: Scuba divers get up close to tiger sharks in the Bahamas and Australia; divers are introduced to the rare salmon shark in Alaska.

title: Blue Realm
subTitle: Manta rays in the Socorro Islands off Mexico's Pacific coast; Bubbles, a 15-foot manta in the Bahamas.

title: The Blue Realm
subTitle: Researchers hope to prove reef squid speak to each other with a language they paint on their skin; egg-laying rituals of reef squid; largest octopus.

title: Roaring with Pride
subTitle: ALERT seeks to return lions to the wild.

title: Roaring with Pride
subTitle: ALERT challenges skeptics by releasing captive-bred lions into the wild; This pioneering program aims to restore Africa's lion population to its former glory, defying doubts about reintroduction success.

title: Blue World
subTitle: Jonathan Bird and Dr. Steven Karger conduct research on Florida's blacktip sharks using planes.

title: Blue World
subTitle: Jonathan explores Lake Champlain, the 13th largest U.S. lake, using a World War II landing craft.

title: Blue World
subTitle: Jonathan explores deep shipwrecks in Vermont, including the Lavalley tugboat.

title: Blue World
subTitle: Jonathan explores underwater caves and explains Earth's water-dependent life.

title: Vet Tales
subTitle: Boss the dog has a nasty injury from a possum trap; the fire brigade are called to save a cat stuck up a tree; Mark and Stacey compete in a fireman's challenge.

title: Vet Tales
subTitle: Stacey discovers Marama the poodle has breast cancer; Mark tries to save a herd of pregnant cows from miscarrying; the Vet North team dart calves amongst the dinosaurs.

title: Vet Tales
subTitle: Molly the dog is paralyzed in a hit-and-run accident; Mark is having a busy day with pigs, goats, horses and a mauled cow; Stacey treats a tortoise with a sore leg.

title: Vet Tales
subTitle: Bear the Labrador has come in to see Stacey again for a sore knee; Stacey travels up to Auckland to assist Mark with a calf that's stuck in the birth canal.

title: Race of Life
subTitle: A look at how elephants survive on a strict plant-and-vegetable-based diet, as they explore the African Savannah and fight thousands of battles everyday.

title: Race of Life
subTitle: A look at how the males and females of some species fight, which can often lead to death, and examines the brevity of their arguments.

title: Race of Life
subTitle: A look at how prey utilize defensive adaptations such as speed as an effective means to escape from various predators and survive.

title: Race of Life
subTitle: Showcasing of how avian predators and prey attack and evade each other, including horizontal speeding, turning and diving.

title: Animal Society
subTitle: Caniforms inhabit various habitats worldwide; divided into nine families, including all bears, wolves and foxes, their size and lifestyles vary considerably.

title: Animal Society
subTitle: Ancient as the dinosaurs themselves take a look at the family structure of crocodiles, turtles and snakes.

title: INWILD
subTitle: The big cats are a group of apex predators that rest firmly at the top of the food chain; lions, leopards and tigers all live uniquely with particular hunting prowess, advantages and pack hierarchy or solitary territories.

title: INWILD
subTitle: Explore the worlds of hooved animals from deer and rhinos to pigs and goats. A diverse collection of some of the most interesting animals in the world.

title: Wild About
subTitle: Twenty-seven species of turtles are on the very brink of becoming extinct; over 240 additional species being threatened or critically endangered.

title: Wild Ones
subTitle: Nature documentary series exploring the different ways that animals behave This episode looks at some of the cutest creatures.

title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
subTitle: Anchorage faces record insecurity levels in the Arctic; Animals, not humans, commit crimes, vandalism, burglaries, and petty thefts; Wildlife engages in criminal acts, challenging the city's safety norms.

title: Animal Science
subTitle: An animal series with a uniquely scientific approach shows how and why creatures are able to excel.

title: Animal Science
subTitle: Fearsome predators: owls; leopards.

title: Animal Science
subTitle: Animals who live in the freezing arctic: the polar bear; the wolverine.

title: Arctic City
subTitle: Discover how people and animals cohabit in the remote urban metropolis that is Anchorage Alaska.

title: Arctic City
subTitle: Anchorage has a rather unique resident who is renowned as nature's lumberjack and North Americas largest rodent, the beaver.

title: Arctic City
subTitle: Anchorage is home to over 2000 moose and these notorious animals are running riot; with 300,000 people living alongside wild animals, the sizzling summer heat, sometimes brings conflict between humans and wildlife.

title: Animals at Work
subTitle: Miss Kitty the pig starts work in the fields, pest control dog Tracker sniffs out termites in Florida and a group of otters go on a playful PR mission in the UK.

title: Animals at Work
subTitle: An elephant named Bubbles prepares for her big show.

title: Animals at Work
subTitle: Nine irresistible Labrador pups get the chance to star in a TV ad campaign, a pair of heritage oxen stick together in Nova Scotia in Canada, and `Superdog' and his pals perform a high flying routine at half time.

title: Second Chance Pets
subTitle: A dog named Luna is hit by a car and needs a brace to avoid amputation; Miley the bulldog needs her brace adjusted.

title: Second Chance Pets
subTitle: Checking on a goat that may be a good candidate for a brace; a dog named Zachery Lee needs a brace to get back on the job at its owner's salon.

title: Second Chance Pets
subTitle: A dog named Nya was in a serious car accident and needs a brace to fully heal; a dog named Ringo had an injury when he was adopted and after years of bearing weight, needs a brace to help strengthen his leg.

subTitle: Vet Johan helps a young elephant tangled in wire; teaching a newborn giraffe to drink.

title: Shamwari
subTitle: A buffalo is tested for tuberculosis; baby elephant needs rescue; ranger watches lions kill wildebeest; two leopards get a second chance at life when they're rescued from a zoo in Monaco.

title: Shamwari
subTitle: An angry rhino attacks the wildlife team; an orphaned baby elephant gets a playmate; a capture team ranger injured by wildebeest; check out a rare footage of two leopards leaping.

title: Shamwari
subTitle: A tranquilized lion wakes up early; the staff struggles to get the baby elephant to drink milk; the game capture team tracks a hippo; a torrential downpour wreaks havoc at the animal hospital.

title: Wild Animal Rescue
subTitle: Four Paws swings into action to relocate the 15 remaining animals in desperate need of aid from the "worst zoo in the world," Khan Younis Zoo.

title: Wild Animal Rescue
subTitle: The team puts their lives on the line to raise orphaned rhinos and return them to the wild; a high-stakes rescue mission gives big cats a new home in Lionsrock sanctuary.

title: Orphans of the Wild
subTitle: It's a year later and things have changed; Marlice and Rudie have a new baby boy and he needs to be introduced to the animals.

title: Orphans of the Wild
subTitle: While looking for the three missing caracals, Kiewiet finds suspicious-looking human tracks; Rudie and Flo investigate and believe the tracks belong to a poacher; Rudie, Kiewiet and Flo do a stakeout from a watchtower and later apprehend a suspect.

title: Orphans of the Wild
subTitle: One of the wild dogs has a snakebite wound; Marlice and Rudie take her to their clinic; a caracal with a broken leg arrives at Naankuse, and they take her to a vet in Windhoek.

subTitle: Examines the lives of the fox, lynx and harpy eagle, three majestic and cunning predators living in the wild.

title: Killer Instincts
subTitle: Examines the lives of the ferocious barracuda, the playful yet aggressive leopard seal and the powerful bull shark.

subTitle: Female sea turtles; western long-beaked echidna; Sumatran rhinoceros.

subTitle: Some animals have the aerial advantage; they're the fearless fliers that have the battlefield covered, scoping out the situation with super senses and the right stuff.

title: Wild Iberia
subTitle: Life begins once again as the sun is heating all in the Iberian peninsula; as animals awaken with the flowers, the softness of the weather has everyone building and breeding.

title: Wild Iberia
subTitle: With the exception of the mountains and the north of Iberia, almost everywhere else is over 30 C and some places in the south are even reaching 50 C, bringing about a great thirst among the animals.

title: Wild Iberia
subTitle: Summer ended several days ago and Autumn is invading the whole of Iberia as cicadas and the grasshoppers have ceased to sing and the ants will soon be eating their corpses.
